The Opuntia genus, commonly known as Prickly Pear Cactus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the cactus family (Cactaceae). The health benefits of Opuntia spp. include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which make it a popular remedy for various conditions such as wounds, skin issues, and digestive problems. The most common herbal preparations made with Opuntia spp. include tea, juice, and capsules, as well as topical creams and ointments for skin conditions.
